rows.label: tev045501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev045501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Liana about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev045501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev045501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Liana if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev045501_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Liana about casualties
during the attack.

rows.label: tev045501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Liana about the attack.

rows.label: tev045501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Liana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045501_SEL1051
rows.name: Ask Liana what she will do next.

rows.label: tev045501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Liana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0001
rows.name: Ma-non ship is fascinating![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0002
rows.name:
See? Look at strangely shaped
boxes. They hold much cargo for
their size, yet float as if empty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ma-non can move them
around ship with ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now I see why Growth want Ma-non
technology. It can work miracles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0009
rows.name:
My brother Nemard is hopelessly
weak. He must be stronger to
be called true Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0010
rows.name:
When we beamed onto ship, he
mewled like child. Cried about
how his body might vanish forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0011
rows.name: I thought I would die of shame.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Grandfather must be so worried that
his heir is flimsy like twig...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Ma-non ship kept us safe from
Growth fire. No one was hurt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Situation was much worse when
Cavern Clan attacked our village.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0019
rows.name: They slaughtered us with Growth weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Those they did not kill were
drugged and taken here as slaves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0021
rows.name:
We are grateful that you
chased Growth away. None
should have to suffer as we did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Growth rallied their most elite
forces for attack on Earth city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0027
rows.name:
But Cavern Clan not elite. They
were grunts. Growth did not
include them in main force.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0028
rows.name: Bah. Typical Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG0029
rows.name:
They boasted of being proud Growth
warriors. But they were only glorified
meat shields. Just too stupid to know it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1001
rows.name:
My brother and Heptana
always hunt these days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1002
rows.name:
His hunting skills are much
better now. It is night and day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1003
rows.name:
It is almost as if marriage
made him better Bias...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1004
rows.name:
Only one way to know if marriage has
such power... I must also find mate![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1009
rows.name:
I know every secret of this ship
now. I need something new.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1010
rows.name:
Since my brother is married now,
maybe I will go join BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1011
rows.name:
I hear they let
non-Earth-aliens join now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG1012
rows.name:
If they can do it, so can I. I will
become Collepedian! Scour all of Mira
for rare and wonderful things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG2001
rows.name:
My brother trains without pause these
days. He seeks to keep Enneana safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG2002
rows.name: He gets stronger day by day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG2003
rows.name:
It is almost as if marriage
made him better Bias...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG2004
rows.name:
Only one way to know if marriage has
such power... I must also find mate![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG3001
rows.name:
I promised Grandfather we
would explore Mira together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG3002
rows.name: I never got to keep promise...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG3003
rows.name:
But I know he is out there. He is reborn
as proud beast of Valley of Oblivion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG3004
rows.name:
He can go where he pleases. Eat
what he pleases. It is grand life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045501_MSG3005
rows.name:
Thank you for returning his
flesh to Miran beasts.[ST:wait ]
